posts.text:
I’m excited to soon show off the forthcoming release of Rackula with all of the storage and UX overhaul that I’ve been churning out lately. Not to mention all the tech debt that I’ve been paying down. 

Okay, it’s just me practicing my Mavis Beacon skills while Claude does the work. Though for me, this project has gone from a silly idea to something more tangible and used by thousands worldwide. It’s very gratifying.

I’m considering doing a version of Rackula with Cloudflare workers backed by their R2 storage. 

I’m curious, anyone have experience building ontop of R2 storage? It’s either that or straight to Postgres, and I’d rather be lean (free egress seems awesome). 

Any FOSS examples would be helpful and appreciated. Thoughts, anyone?
